Straight Glass Dip Pen - Eclat de Saphir
accessories.note: SKU H21716. The "straight" or "round" pen description refers to the overall shape of the pen. This straight pen doesn't have the ball near the grip. It writes more like an Extra Fine/Fine. Pretty good for dabbing ink when using the end of the shaft.

accessories.name: Round Glass Dip Pen - Clear
accessories.note: SKU H21401. Definitely more delicate than the straight glass pen. It feels more like Extra Fine when writing in the journal. Almost like cutting the page. The grip is ok, but not very smooth on the finger joint.

journal.note: The Viper series is one of my favorite pens. They look and feel great and they are very affordable.
Be careful with this ink. It has high shimmer and high sheen. It was hard to clean from the pen.
This is a high shimmer ink. Shake well before use. It's a pain to clean.

journal.accessory: Straight Glass Dip Pen - Eclat de Saphir
journal.note: The "straight" or "round" pen description refers to the overall shape of the pen. This straight pen doesn't have the ball near the grip. It writes more like an Extra Fine/Fine. Pretty good for dabbing ink when using the end of the shaft.
Definitely more delicate than the straight glass pen. It feels more like Extra Fine when writing in the journal. Almost like cutting the page. The grip is ok, but not very smooth on the finger joint.
This is really not a good match. I find that the ink doesn't flow well. The ink color is very cool looking, but it's not spreading well with this pen/nib.
Don’t use with Extra Fine or Fine nibs. It’s far to light and is hard to read.
Too light for Extra Fine and Fine nibs.
